data.label: Rive
data.description: Rive 是一种新的构建生产就绪 UI 和图形的方式——具有丰富的互动性和基于状态的动画。它消除了对硬编码图形的需求，使团队能够更快迭代，构建更好的产品。

data.label: Rive
data.description: Rive is a new way to build production-ready UI and graphics — with rich interactivity and state-driven animation. It removes the need for hard-coded graphics, empowering teams to iterate faster and build better products.
